biologic_status.name: Entyvio
biologic_status.reasoning: Finally convinced doctors to try Entyvio. Supposedly gut-selective, less systemic impact. Insurance denied three times... Finally approved. Started three months ago.

treatment_journey.evidence: Started budesonide... Helps somewhat but not long-term solution.
